title: MUSIC A Chinese rendition of the Cruel Angels Thesis
display_title: MUSIC A Chinese rendition of the Cruel Angels Thesis
wikitext:
[]: [MUSIC] A Chinese rendition of the Cruel Angel's Thesis             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu Jul 17, 2008 10:26 pm Just now I was told when Eva was broadcast in China (excluding Hong Kong, for she was still England's colony in 1996), a Chinese version of Cruel Angel's Thesis was specifically written and sung for the show. I have no information whatsoever about this Chinese version. Have anyone come across this cover before? Thanks. PS. Though not having heard this purported version before, intuition told me it wouldn't sound nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 17, 2008 10:38 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YANMPlEwI8g

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Thu Jul 17, 2008 11:06 pm Alright, I'm damned.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Jul 18, 2008 7:27 am

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 18, 2008 7:48 am On a side note, a lot of the random Chinese pop music I hear sound startlingly similar to that.

[]:             Quote Post by StandardEvaFan » Sat Jul 19, 2008 7:16 am I lol'd. They just translated the lyrics and stuffed them into the song. Even the translation is laughable EX: Like a cruel angel... >>>> 美丽的天使在召唤你 Which means: The beautiful angel is summoning you. Not just only that, the key was wayyyyyy off. I can both read and speak chinese

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Sat Jul 19, 2008 8:06 am MISTRANSLATION?! Surely not in eva?

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Jul 19, 2008 3:13 pm

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Sat Jul 19, 2008 4:04 pm Ornette wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YANMPlEwI8g

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Jul 22, 2008 1:05 am O M G...it kind of sounds like what happens when you play a song backwards. Poor, poor China can never fully enjoy eva now with a beginning sequence like that.

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Tue Jul 22, 2008 11:23 pm Ugh!! :verysad: I think I'm gonna have nightmares for 7 nights straight now.... How can they do this to Evangelion?!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jul 23, 2008 11:06 am I am so thankful I didn't bother listening to this.

[]:             Quote Post by Barinax » Wed Aug 06, 2008 5:46 pm ...I think it would help if the singing was, you know, lower. Since we're on the subject of adaptations of the OP, take a look at this: (http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OF5urVrPk4w) By the way, there was a Korean one somewhere. I can't seem to remember why I heard it.

[]:             Quote Post by swamp147 » Thu Aug 07, 2008 10:07 pm Barinax wrote: Since we're on the subject of adaptations of the OP, take a look at this: (http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OF5urVrPk4w)

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Aug 08, 2008 10:43 am Barinax wrote: Since we're on the subject of adaptations of the OP, take a look at this: (http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OF5urVrPk4w)

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 05, 2008 7:02 am Dammit! The Chinese get a shitbox dub before they make an English shitbox dub, well I'll be damned.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sat Sep 06, 2008 1:09 pm Wow. I'm so lucky to live in Hong Kong where we don't get any of this stuff.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sat Sep 06, 2008 3:33 pm I didn't find the song that earsplitting, actually. Just not satisfactory.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sat Sep 06, 2008 4:20 pm ಥ_ಥ

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Sat Sep 06, 2008 8:06 pm ಥ_ಥ
